text.title: OpenTelemetry Rollout Runbook Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end. Each step has input, action, output, and an optional decision-gate.

step.name: gather-typed-inputs
step.input: Trigger context (ticket, transcript, dashboard) + team roster
step.action: Populate the Prerequisites table from Section above. Reject any free-form prose without a named source.
step.output: Typed inputs object (name + source per row)
step.decision-gate: If any required input is missing OR has no source, STOP and request from upstream.

step.name: check-applicability
step.action: Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml` starting from root-question. Record which branch was taken at each node.
step.decision-gate: If conclusion == skip-this-methodology, STOP and route to the named fallback.

step.name: produce-artefact
step.action: Fill the template at `templates/`. Anchor every non-trivial value to a verbatim citation (trace_refs).

step.name: validate-contract
step.decision-gate: If the script exits 1, fix the violations and re-run. Do not bypass.

step.name: register-and-handoff
step.action: Commit / publish to the named storage location. Notify the named owner. Schedule next review (<=90 days).
